concerns.note: DONE backlog steady at 35 tasks — tester processes 1 per cycle (every 2 hours) while developers add ~1 per cycle. Net backlog not growing but not shrinking either. At current rate, tester throughput matches developer output but doesn't reduce the existing pile. Not critical — all features are deployed and functional, verification is for quality assurance.
